title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: Satellite 6.16.5.7 Async Update
overview: An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description:
Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizations to configure and maintain their systems without the necessity to provide public Internet access to their servers or other client systems. It performs provisioning and configuration management of predefined standard operating environments.Bug Fix(es): EOL banner has a broken link to Red Hat Satellite Upgrade Helper (SAT-40672).  Upgrade to 6.16 breaks webui due to the release of RHBA-2025:22621 (SAT-41037). 
Users of Red Hat Satellite are advised to upgrade to these updated packages, which fix these bugs.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: EOL banner has broken link to Red Hat Satellite Upgrade Helper
Upgrade to 6.16 breaks webui due to the release of RHBA-2025:22621

full_text:
An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizations to configure and maintain their systems without the necessity to provide public Internet access to their servers or other client systems. It performs provisioning and configuration management of predefined standard operating environments.Bug Fix(es): EOL banner has a broken link to Red Hat Satellite Upgrade Helper (SAT-40672).  Upgrade to 6.16 breaks webui due to the release of RHBA-2025:22621 (SAT-41037). 
Users of Red Hat Satellite are advised to upgrade to these updated packages, which fix these bugs.
